title: Plug Power (PLUG) Q1 2023 Earnings: What to Expect
text: Wall Street expected Plug Power to report a per-share loss of 26 cents on revenue of $205.14 million for Q1 2023, compared to the year-ago quarter loss of 27 cents per share on revenue of $140.8 million. The company was anticipated to show revenue growth of approximately 46% year-over-year. Q1 2023 represented a critical period for Plug Power as the company continued to demonstrate top-line growth while managing operating expenses. For Q2 2023, Wall Street expected Plug Power to report a per-share loss of 25 cents on revenue of $237.4 million, compared to the year-ago quarter loss of 30 cents per share on revenue of $151.27 million. For Q3 2023, Wall Street expected Plug Power to report a per-share loss of 30 cents on revenue of $237.92 million. The company's fiscal 2023 revenue projection was about $1.2 billion. In the near term, PLUG needed to show progress in gross margin improvement for the stock to rebound.
